name: OpenClaw
summary: Summary The SSRF/IP classifier treated several IPv6 special-use ranges as public and allowed fetches to proceed.
description:
Summary


The SSRF/IP classifier treated several IPv6 special-use ranges as public and allowed fetches to proceed.


Impact


An attacker who controlled a fetched URL could target internal or non-routable IPv6 addresses that should have been blocked
by the SSRF guard.


Affected Component


src/shared/net/ip.ts, src/infra/net/ssrf.*


Fixed Versions


- Affected: <= 2026.3.24

- Patched: >= 2026.3.28

- Latest stable 2026.3.28 contains the fix.


Fix


Fixed by commit d61f8e5672 (Net: block missing IPv6 special-use ranges).
suggestion: Upgrade openclaw to >= 2026.3.28 or later. Fixed by commit d61f8e5672 (Net: block missing IPv6 special-use
